final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: social media advertisement, square crop
Primary request: luxury skincare serum bottle with rose petals and water splash
Scene/backdrop: soft pink gradient background, minimal and elegant
Subject: glass serum bottle with golden liquid visible through transparent glass, rose petals floating around, water droplets splashing
Style/medium: commercial product photography, high-end beauty editorial
Composition/framing: centered product shot, 85mm lens, soft depth of field
Lighting/mood: soft natural light, diffused studio lighting, luxurious and refined atmosphere
Color palette: soft pink gradient + golden liquid + rose petal pink + white water droplets
Materials/textures: smooth glass surface, liquid transparency, delicate rose petals, fresh water droplets
Constraints: keep the bottle as the clear focal point, maintain luxury aesthetic suitable for social media
Avoid: harsh shadows, cluttered background, plastic-looking materials, over-saturated colors, watermark
